stemHtml: Select the correct statement regarding RNP AR APCH.

options.a: No specific authorization is required for this navigation specification.
options.b: An aircraft approved for RNP AR APCH automatically grants approval for every navigation specification.
options.c: The operator needs to be approved to operate in this airspace.
options.d: RNP AR APCH requires lateral navigation (LNAV) accuracy of ± 1 NM.
